sglang.title: Fix missing numpy dependency in pyproject.toml
sglang.author: fpreiss
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
numpy is currently listed as an optional dependency. With the current version on pypi and on the master branch, sglang will fail to import without numpy installed. See the log output below:
Python 3.11.9 (main, May 27 2024, 20:31:01) [GCC 14.1.1 20240507] on linux
Type "help", "copyright", "credits"

vllm.title: [Frontend][Misc] Enforce Pixel Values as Input Type for VLMs in API Server
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a check on the image input type when launching vLLM API server for serving vision language models. Eventually we shouldn't need this check when we can get rid of VisionLanguageConfig after the developer facing refactoring.

Thank you for your contribut

vllm.title: [Misc] Improve error message when LoRA parsing fails
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The existing behavior of parse_fine_tuned_lora_name may raise an AssertionError without showing exactly how, leading to user confusion as evidenced by #4682 and #4883.
This PR adjusts the code so that a proper error message is always shown, along with the name of the failing tensor.
FIX #4682
FIX #4

vllm.title: [Model] Initial support for LLaVA-NeXT
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I have added experimental support for LLaVA-NeXT, with one big caveat: the size of the input image is fixed by the configuration, otherwise the feature size (i.e. number of  tokens to duplicate) would vary depending on the runtime input. This prevents us from taking full advantage of the extra resol

vllm.title: [Feature][Frontend]:  Continued `stream_options` implementation also in CompletionRequest
vllm.author: Etelis
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR introduces support for the stream_option parameter in the CompletionRequest class.
Continuing the previous PR: #5135
FIX #4967(link existing issues this PR will resolve)

vllm.title: [ci] Use small_cpu_queue for doc build
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Doc build doesn't need the heavy CPU instance to build: https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci-aws/builds/571#_
Let's use the small one to cut a bit on cost & save space for other image build steps

vllm.title: [ci] Mount buildkite agent on Docker container to upload benchmark results
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: CI AWS pipeline is not showing benchmarks results on the build because the buildkite agent is not living in the Docker container that benchmark job runs in. This is to mount BK agent in the container and fix the path to buildkite-agent so results can be uploaded and displayed on the BK build.

vllm.title: [Docs] Add Docs on Limitations of VLM Support
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds an important note on the VLM page regarding current limitations on VLM support.

vllm.title: [Doc] Add documentation for FP8 W8A8
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Initial documentation for the FP8 W8A8 quantization feature, detailing how to produce quantized checkpoints models ahead of time using AutoFP8 in addition to the dynamic quantization within vLLM.

vllm.title: [ci] Fix Buildkite agent path
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
c5602f0 didn't get the path of buildkite-agent when checking whether the path exists. Calling buildkite-agent by itself still works. This PR is to have it check the full path of buildkite agent binary as /usr/bin/buildkite-agent .
Passing build with benchmark results in the build is here: https://bu

vllm.title: [Misc] Various simplifications and typing fixes
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Noticed while working on other features, thought it would be cleaner to split into a separate PR.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] OpenAI entrypoint limits logprobs while ignoring server defined --max-logprobs
vllm.author: maor-ps
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Current check implementation disregards the server parameters --max-logprobs and restricts the logprobs returned from the server. This modification removes the upper limit and ensures that the logprobs values are only checked to be positive integers.

Thank you for

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Cleanup "fix chat logprobs"
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up to #5029 and #5031:

Fix finish_reason being too strict (SequenceStatus.get_finished_reason can return 'abort' which is not in OpenAI spec)
Check strict equality instead of upper-bounding number of logprobs returned by Chat Completions API.
Remove unnecessary logprobs check in test_single_

vllm.title: [Doc] add debugging tips
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add common tips for debugging hang/crash.
